response.overview: Anna, a young call girl, is consumed by obsession after her regular client, Julien, disappears without a word. Trapped in the silence of her apartment, she spirals through memory and desire, replaying fragments of their past encounters. As she clings to sensations more imagined than real, the line between intimacy and illusion begins to blur. An exploration of erotic fixation and the void it leaves behind.
response.title: JE T'ENTENDS SUR MA PEAU
